title: Dramatic Eye Roll Reaction
description: An authentic, high-speed human reaction of a Latina creator doing a genuine, dramatic eye roll.

prompt.concept: Authentic, high-speed human reaction. A beautiful Latin creator does a genuine, dramatic eye roll — the kind a real person does when they're done with someone's nonsense. Reflexive, not theatrical.

character.hair: dark brown wavy hair, shoulder length, voluminous with natural texture
character.skin: warm olive skin tone, realistic texture with natural pores, soft bronzy makeup, subtle highlight on cheekbones
character.eyes: deep brown eyes with thick natural lashes, locked on camera before rolling
character.expression: dramatic done-with-it eye roll. Starts with a flat unimpressed stare, then eyes track upward slowly, head tilts back slightly, deep exhale through nose

wardrobe.top: deep burgundy ribbed turtleneck, high-quality fabric, no logos
wardrobe.nails: long dark cherry red almond nails, glossy

camera.lens_feel: iPhone 15 Pro front camera, 1x zoom, sharp focus on eyes

lighting.key: warm natural light, golden catchlights in eyes

prompt.micro_idle_before_reaction: 0.0-0.5s flat unimpressed stare directly at camera, one slow blink

action_timeline.beat: Flat, unimpressed stare directly at camera. One slow deliberate blink.
Eye roll begins: eyes track upward and to one side smoothly, head tilts back about 10 degrees, audible 'tsk' or sigh through nose, shoulders rise slightly
Eyes return to camera with a 'really?' deadpan look, one eyebrow slightly raised, mouth in a tight flat line. Holds the 'I cannot with this' energy.

gesture_rules.movement_style: Smooth but deliberate. The eye roll itself is fluid, but the return to camera is sharp.
realism_ticks: slight jaw clench when eyes return to camera

no_text_no_graphics.note: Zero text, zero UI, zero watermarks. Pure raw footage.
